name: Medication Side Effect Visit Log
description: Create a clinician-ready timeline and visit brief for possible side effects after a medication or supplement start, stop, or change.
author: OpenClaw
target_user: Patients, caregivers, and family members preparing for a doctor or pharmacist conversation about symptoms after a medication or supplement change.
use_cases: Prepare a clinician-ready side effect timeline after a medication or supplement change
Track symptom onset, duration, frequency, severity, and context factors
Separate observed facts from concerns before a medical visit
Generate neutral questions for a doctor, pharmacist, nurse line, or clinic
Create an ongoing tracking table without medical decision-making
